_comment: Stage-4 M1.3 + 偏离修正1 (2026-05-15) + behavior-graph 重设计 (2026-05-29): design+interaction stage overlay (H4 naming). When stage='interaction', merges into settings.json. Visual-interaction-manifest direct write is denied — manifest must come from `harness evidence visual manifest` CLI. interaction-spec/behavior-graph.yaml + surface-model.md 是手写真相源（允许 Write via interaction-spec/**）；interaction-spec/views/** 是 `harness interaction project` 的生成产物，禁止手写（deny）。 WebFetch/WebSearch are routed through ask channel since visual evidence collection requires user authorization. Cross-lane deny added (偏离修正1) to mirror solution / technical_analysis overlays — when in interaction lane, writes to solution.md / tech-design.md / *.contract.yaml of other lanes are physically blocked. The operable prototype lives in the project-owned prototype project dir (prototype.interactive_prototype.prototype_project_root, recommended default prototype/), not under project-knowledge/ and not under the mission artifact; provenance comes from that dir's git history, not a knowledge-side registry. A non-default prototype_project_root is not pre-allowed and will prompt, same as the frontend_engineering route's project root.
